name: Red and Green Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh kale, broccoli rabe, or spinach, stems removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta until it is al-dente.
2. In a 2-1/2 quart saucepan, sauté the bacon or ham until crisp.
3. Add the garlic and red pepper flakes; cook until the garlic is tender.
4. Stir in the crushed tomatoes with their liquid and chicken bouillon.
5. Cook for 2-3 minutes with the lid on.
6. Mix in the greens and continue cooking, covered, on high heat for 6-8 minutes until they are wilted.
7. Drain the pasta and mix it with the sauce, then sprinkle with Parmesan cheese before serving.
